name: figma-template-pages-plugin
description: Figma plugin to create template pages

scripts.preflight: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.release:patch: npm run preflight && npm version patch && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run preflight && npm version minor && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm run preflight && npm version major && git push --follow-tags
